faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Bay Terrace?
faqs.answer: Bay Terrace's location near parks, wooded areas, and the waterfront creates perfect conditions for ticks to thrive. With deer ticks carrying Lyme disease prevalent in Staten Island, professional tick control protects your family and pets from potentially serious tick-borne illnesses when enjoying your yard or nearby outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: How often should I schedule tick control treatments in Bay Terrace?
faqs.answer: We recommend tick control treatments every 4-6 weeks during peak tick season (April through October) for optimal protection. For year-round prevention in Bay Terrace, quarterly treatments help maintain a tick-free barrier around your property, especially if you have pets or children who play outdoors regularly.

faqs.question: What does the $125 - $325 price range include?
faqs.answer: Our tick control pricing depends on your property size and treatment frequency. The $125 service covers smaller yards with single treatments, while $325 includes larger properties or seasonal packages. All services include comprehensive yard inspection, professional-grade tick spray application, and follow-up support to ensure complete tick elimination.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered tick control products that are safe for children and pets once dried, typically within 2-3 hours. Our trained technicians apply treatments strategically to areas where ticks congregate while minimizing exposure to high-traffic areas of your Bay Terrace property.
